title: Environment Canada to use AI in new weather forecasting
description: Environment and Climate Change Canada says it will use artificial intelligence to make its weather forecasts more accurate.
content:
OTTAWA — Environment and Climate Change Canada says it will use artificial intelligence to make its weather forecasts more accurate.

title: Federal courtt rejects Anthropic's bid to block War Dept AI blacklisting

title: Meta rolls out new AI model in latest effort to catch up with rivals
description: Mark Zuckerberg-run Meta has rolled out a new artificial intelligence model designed to power everything from shopping suggestions to chat -- the latest effort in the tech giant’s costly push to catch up in the AI race.
content:

title: Labor Secretary to Newsmax: Free AI Course Offered Now
description: Labor Secretary Lori Chavez-DeRemer told Newsmax that the Trump administration is pushing to make workers proficient and literate in AI through a federal initiative she described as an easy entry point for Americans worried about how artificial intelligence could reshape the job market.
